title: Multiple Outlook Calendars Assigned to One Task

posts.author: CBryant (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We’ve just started using the Outlook Calendar integration and discovered that tasks can only sync to one calendar. If you assign a second person to an item it will not sync to their calendar even when they’ve setup the same automation with their calendar account. Being able to sync a single item to multiple calendars would greatly improve our workflows as Outlook is the Calendar we use day-to-day.

Thanks!
